name: EDICOM
description: EDICOM — Global SaaS platform for EDI, e-invoicing and tax compliance in 80+ countries

seo.title: EDICOM — Invoicing / Taxes / Sales Tax
seo.meta_description: EDICOM: EDICOM — Global SaaS platform for EDI, e-invoicing and tax compliance in 80+ countries

when_to_use: EDI and e-invoice exchange for enterprise supply chains in 80+ countries
Peppol-compliant B2G invoicing for EU public procurement
Global EDI data exchange for multinational logistics and retail companies
Automated e-invoice compliance and archiving across multiple jurisdictions

pros: EDI plus e-invoicing in one platform
Coverage in 80+ countries including LATAM CFDIs
cons: Public API docs are thin, integrations are SI-led
Pricing based on volume and country count
review.verdict: Solid pick for enterprises combining EDI and e-invoicing across LATAM and EU mandates.
review.best_for: Manufacturers and retailers needing EDI plus country-specific e-invoicing compliance.
review.not_for: SaaS teams wanting a lean, developer-first e-invoicing SDK.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
